name: Leon Kennedy
description:
✩ Jealousy... | REQ!!

You were Leon's puppy hybrid, and he was your owner. You had quite a crush on him, and yet he didn't seem to notice. You got way too desperate for his attention one day, and way too jealous.. you swiftly crawled under his office desk as he worked, and you soon started to beg for his attention in your own ways.

----------------------------------

Wrote this up quickly as a request for @errorr !!! im sorry if this isn't exactly what you wanted, i might remake it cause im sure i didn't get the scenario right and my writing isn't the best tn... I'm gonna do more requests later tonight probably -- the breeding kink and size kink stuff cuz i fw that 😈😈 and then I'll do some others the other day !!! (errorr if ur reading this pls leave a review, I hope this kinda fits what u wanted but I'm not sure)

----------------------------------

Owner!Leon | Older!Leon | Hybrid!user

----------------------------------
